checkpoint_accepted_claim: Standalone all-24-layer full MLP substitutive tensor harness passes for Qwen2.5-0.5B using official llama.cpp Q2_K W_low plus k=1% sparse residual via encode_sdir, under consistent seed=42. All 24 available FFN layers are memory-positive, cosine-positive, and MAE-improving versus Q2_K-only in the tested harness.
w_low_encoding: official llama.cpp Q2_K via quantize_row_q2_K_ref / dequantize_row_q2_K

correction_chain.31AS: PASS_ALL_LAYERS (initial, incorrect) — missed layer 21 cosine regression
correction_chain.31AS-R: PARTIAL_LAYER_VARIANCE — layer 21 cosine regresses at seed=63 (per-layer seed artifact)
correction_chain.31AT: PARTIAL_LAYER21_ACTIVATION_SENSITIVE — layer 21 is activation-sensitive; 9/10 seeds improve
correction_chain.31AU-R: PASS (label-only fix) — MAE column label corrected; numeric pass/fail unchanged

known_limitations: standalone tensor harness only — results apply only to tested full-MLP tensor evaluation path
no generation/inference claim — no autoregressive or sequence-level evaluation performed
no llama.cpp integration — residual not integrated into llama.cpp dequantization path
no speed claim — no throughput or latency measurements performed
activation robustness — fully characterized only for seed=42; layer 21: 9/10 seeds positive
no larger model claim — Qwen2.5-0.5B only; results may not generalize to larger models
no full-model memory savings — aggregate margin is across all 24 layers but no runtime memory allocation claim made
forbidden_claims: no full-model runtime memory savings claim
no claim beyond standalone full-MLP tensor harness
